title: Pukka Pad, 5-Subject A4+ Project Book 3-Pack with Repositionable Dividers - 200 Pages of 80GSM Paper with 8mm Lines and Perforated Edges - Metallic Green – 29.7 x 23cm
features: Fun Metallic Covers: Combine designs with your Pukka Pad binders, folders, and other office and school supplies from the metallic collection with hardback covers that make taking notes and making lists a little edgier

Notebook Reimagined: Take your notebook to the next level with the Pukka Pad Project Books, a revolutionary take on the classic notebook that introduces repositionable dividers, allowing you to efficiently manage multiple school subjects and work projects in a single space

Thick and Sturdy Sheets: Each journal features 200 pages of 60GSM paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding with perforated margins, making them easy to tear out for turning in work or passing notes in class

Office Essential: From project managers to college students and media reporters, everyone needs a set of cute, reliable, and fashion-forward notepads to show colleagues and clients how professional and organised you are
Multi-Pack of Notebooks: Available sets of 3 notebooks, these project books are great for your professional memos, informal ideas, and doodles; they fit perfectly into your backpack, locker, or desk
description: Pukka Pad, a leading global manufacturer of professional and student stationery, notebooks, dividers, file products, paper pads, packaging materials, and art and activity books, has expanded its collection of beautiful yet functional collection of office products and school supplies Stay organised and on task with these three project notebooks from Pukka Pad. Each notebook features 200 pages of 80GSM paper with perforated edges, making them easy to remove for turning in your college assignments or leaving memos for your family. They also have four repositionable dividers so you can remove and replace them, creating five custom-sized sections to keep each project separate and organised. The 5 Subject Notebooks from Pukka Pad are essential for all professionals and students to stay stylish and sorted. Founded in the UK in 1999, Pukka Pad has designed beautiful and functional stationery for the office, school, and home to encourage you to be inspired, write, create, and get organized every day.
